name: should generate a tackle assist columns query
description: Test case for should generate a tackle assist columns query
expected_query: with "tf11890ff3026bb6310b96dd6deeafa55" as materialized (select pid, SUM(CASE WHEN pid_column = 'solo_tackle_1_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'solo_tackle_2_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'solo_tackle_3_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'assisted_tackle_1_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'assisted_tackle_2_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'tackle_assist_1_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'tackle_assist_2_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'tackle_assist_3_pid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS combined_tackles_from_plays from (select assisted_tackle_1_pid as pid, 'assisted_tackle_1_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year, nfl_week_id from "nfl_plays" where "assisted_tackle_1_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select assisted_tackle_2_pid as pid, 'assisted_tackle_2_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year, nfl_week_id from "nfl_plays" where "assisted_tackle_2_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select solo_tackle_1_pid as pid, 'solo_tackle_1_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year, nfl_week_id from "nfl_plays" where "solo_tackle_1_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select solo_tackle_2_pid as pid, 'solo_tackle_2_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year, nfl_week_id from "nfl_plays" where "solo_tackle_2_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select solo_tackle_3_pid as pid, 'solo_tackle_3_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year, nfl_week_id from "nfl_plays" where "solo_tackle_3_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select tackle_assist_1_pid as pid, 'tackle_assist_1_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year, nfl_week_id from "nfl_plays" where "tackle_assist_1_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select tackle_assist_2_pid as pid, 'tackle_assist_2_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year, nfl_week_id from "nfl_plays" where "tackle_assist_2_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select tackle_assist_3_pid as pid, 'tackle_assist_3_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year, nfl_week_id from "nfl_plays" where "tackle_assist_3_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023)) as "defensive_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "defensive_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "defensive_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "pid"), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", "tf11890ff3026bb6310b96dd6deeafa55"."combined_tackles_from_plays" AS "combined_tackles_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "tf11890ff3026bb6310b96dd6deeafa55" on "tf11890ff3026bb6310b96dd6deeafa55"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "tf11890ff3026bb6310b96dd6deeafa55"."combined_tackles_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
